description:
Raspberry Pi Imager is the quick and easy way to install Raspberry Pi OS and other operating systems to a microSD card, ready to use with your Raspberry Pi.

Raspberry Pi Imager is the quick and easy way to install Raspberry Pi OS and other operating systems to a microSD card, ready to use with your Raspberry Pi.

Download and install Raspberry Pi Imager on a computer with an SD card reader. Insert the microSD card you’ll use with your Raspberry Pi into the reader and run Raspberry Pi Imager.
What's Changed
- chore(release): v2.0.6 by @tdewey-rpi in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1477
- feat(installer): Add windows installer dark mode support in rpi-imager.iss.in by @rc-chuah in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1480
- fix(main): Add warning for log paths that are too long by @Ferdinaelectro1 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1481
- Add pt-br translation by @eduardoaddad in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1490
- Update Turkish translations by @Sype0 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1488
- Added documentation clarifying the interaction between old versions of Imager and new versions of RPi OS by @lurch in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1497
- Fix malformed rpi-imager_pt-BR.ts by @lurch in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1499
- Move the development instructions to a separate CONTRIBUTING.md file by @lurch in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1508
- QML: fix property name mismatch in ImFileDialog by @wallentx in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1505
- 2.0.7: Remove legacy mountutils/drivelist, bugfixes by @tdewey-rpi in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1513
- fix(debian): Add missing GUI library dependencies by @tdewey-rpi in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1517
- 2.0.7: Improved combobox search, HK & Macau added, don't store experimental options by @tdewey-rpi in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1525
- 2.0.7: Remove BLKDISCARD, gzip progress bars by @tdewey-rpi in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1528
- Add "Clear saved customisation" button to App Options by @4RH1T3CT0R7 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1501
- fix(cloud-init): Make instance-id durable across reboots by @tdewey-rpi in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1529
- fix(capital-cities): Update capital city entries and handling for Hong Kong by @tdewey-rpi in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1531
- fix(ImFileDialog): allow typing/pasting full file paths in open mode by @4RH1T3CT0R7 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1530
- fix(ImComboBox): use PlatformHelper for scroll direction in closed ComboBox by @4RH1T3CT0R7 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1534
- Fix compile erorr in platformquirks_linux.cpp by @lurch in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1537
- fix(beep): bundle fallback chime for Linux distros without freedesktop sounds by @4RH1T3CT0R7 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1535
- fix(polkit): use /etc/polkit-1/actions for policy on immutable distros by @4RH1T3CT0R7 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1536
- fix(wifi): prevent stale WiFi settings from being applied after Skip by @4RH1T3CT0R7 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1540
- 2.0.7 rollup 2: Fastboot, rpiboot, compute modules, text scaling, proxy support by @tdewey-rpi in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1548
- fix(i18n): add missing French translations for saved customisation settings by @Ferdinaelectro1 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1555
- chore(.gitignore) : add .idea to .gitignore by @Ferdinaelectro1 in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1552
- i18n: complete zh-CN translation by @ykla in https://github.com/raspberrypi/rpi-imager/pull/1554
